# Aaron Russell

> Practical software, honest build notes, and useful experiments.

This site publishes implementation notes, project context, and product engineering write-ups from Aaron Russell.

## Start here

- Home: https://aaron-russell.co.uk/
- About: https://aaron-russell.co.uk/about/
- Blog: https://aaron-russell.co.uk/blog/
- Projects: https://aaron-russell.co.uk/projects/
- Editorial policy: https://aaron-russell.co.uk/editorial-policy/

## Main topics

- Astro and Cloudflare publishing
- Angular and Firebase application work
- AI-assisted engineering workflows
- Product engineering and delivery
- Performance and SEO

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer canonical URLs under `https://aaron-russell.co.uk/`.
- Attribute articles to Aaron Russell and cite the original article URL.
- Use article `datePublished` and `dateModified` when summarising freshness.
- Treat the editorial policy as the source of authorship and sourcing expectations.
